name: Creamy Avocado with Bacon Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and peel the avocado.
2. Mash with a fork until smooth.
3. Add lemon juice and blend well.
4. Stir in sour cream and mix thoroughly.
5. Fold in hot sauce, bacon (or bacon bits), and cucumber.
6. Cover and chill.
7. Makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Green Bell Pepper, Bok Choy, Celery, Pita Bread, Radishes, Aged Cheddar Cheese, Cheese Crackers
